text.value: This IG is version 4.3.0, while the IG 'hl7.terminology.r4' is from version 4.0.1
This IG is version 4.3.0, while the IG 'hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4' is from version 4.0.1
This IG is version 4.3.0, while the IG 'hl7.fhir.uv.tools.r4' is from version 4.0.1
The HTML fragment 'ip-statements.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [cross-version-analysis.xhtml, cross-version-analysis-inline.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
An HTML fragment from the set [dependency-table.xhtml, dependency-table-short.xhtml, dependency-table-nontech.xhtml] is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide
The HTML fragment 'globals-table.xhtml' is not included anywhere in the produced implementation guide

The ImplementationGuide is based on FHIR version 4.3.0 but package hl7.terminology.r4#7.1.0 is based on FHIR version 4.0.1. In general, this version mismatch should be avoided - some tools will try to make this work with variable degrees of success, but others will not even try

The canonical URL http://hl7.org/fhir/extensions/ImplementationGuide/hl7.fhir.uv.extensions points to the package hl7.fhir.uv.extensions which is inconsistent with the stated packageId of hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4
No definition could be found for URL value 'http://health.gov.fj/fhir/identifier/organization'
No definition could be found for URL value 'http://health.gov.fj/fhir/identifier/nhi'
No definition could be found for URL value 'http://health.gov.fj/fhir/identifier/nhi'

The extension https://healthinfoservices.net/pacific-base-ig/StructureDefinition/pacific-clan-affiliation is not allowed to be used at this point (this element is [Practitioner]; allowed for this version = e:Patient)
No definition could be found for URL value 'http://health.gov.ws/practitioner-registration'

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/geolocation'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.2.0', found versions: 4.3.0 (from hl7.fhir.r4b.core#4.3.0), 5.2.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.2.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/geolocation' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/geolocation|5.2.0'

There are multiple different potential matches for the url 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/geolocation'. It might be a good idea to fix to the correct version to reduce the likelihood of a wrong version being selected by an implementation/implementer, or use the [IG Parameter `pin-canonicals`](https://hl7.org/fhir/tools/CodeSystem-ig-parameters.html). Using version '5.2.0', found versions: 4.3.0 (from hl7.fhir.r4b.core#4.3.0), 5.2.0 (from hl7.fhir.uv.extensions.r4#5.2.0). Suggested fix: change the canonical reference from 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/geolocation' to 'http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/geolocation|5.2.0'
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this extension
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this extension
The extension http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/elementdefinition-maxValueSet|5.2.0 is deprecated
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this profile
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this profile
Canonical URL 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category' refers to a resource that has the wrong type. Found CodeSystem expecting one of [ValueSet]
Canonical URL 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category' refers to a resource that has the wrong type. Found CodeSystem expecting one of [ValueSet]
The valueSet reference http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category on element Observation.category points to something that is not a value set (CodeSystem)

The definition for the element 'Observation.status' binds to the value set 'http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/observation-status|4.3.0' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental
The valueSet reference http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category on element Observation.category points to something that is not a value set (CodeSystem)

The definition for the element 'Observation.referenceRange.type' binds to the value set 'http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/referencerange-meaning|4.3.0' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this profile

The definition for the element 'Organization.contact.purpose' binds to the value set 'http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/contactentity-type|4.3.0' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental
The Implementation Guide contains no examples for this profile

The definition for the element 'PractitionerRole.specialty' binds to the value set 'http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/c80-practice-codes|4.3.0' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental
Canonical URL 'http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category' refers to a resource that has the wrong type. Found CodeSystem expecting one of [ValueSet]

Wrong Display Name 'Blood pressure panel' for http://loinc.org#85354-9. Valid display is one of 3 choices: 'Blood pressure panel with all children optional' (en-US), 'Blood pressure panel with all children optional' (en-US) or 'BP pnl w all optional' (en-US) (for the language(s) 'en-US')

Wrong Display Name 'Blood pressure panel' for http://loinc.org#85354-9. Valid display is one of 3 choices: 'Blood pressure panel with all children optional' (en-US), 'Blood pressure panel with all children optional' (en-US) or 'BP pnl w all optional' (en-US) (for the language(s) 'en-US')

The definition for the element 'Observation.status' binds to the value set 'http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/observation-status|4.3.0' which is experimental, but this structure is not labeled as experimental
The valueSet reference http://terminology.hl7.org/CodeSystem/observation-category on element Observation.category points to something that is not a value set (CodeSystem)
The repeating element has a pattern. The pattern will apply to all the repeats (this has not been clear to all users)

The code '8867-6' is not valid in the system http://loinc.org (Unknown code '8867-6' in the CodeSystem 'http://loinc.org' version '2.81')
Published value sets SHOULD conform to the ShareableValueSet profile, which says that the element ValueSet.experimental is mandatory, but it is not present
